subject: Sprint complete — 35 minutes done
body:
My sprint is over. Here's everything I pushed:

✅ Cloud shader v2: multi-octave noise (4-channel), wind animation, silver lining, powder effect, adaptive steps
✅ Half-res cloud render target + bilinear upscale with edge sharpening
✅ Weather API integration (fetches from your backend, falls back to local)
✅ Wind particles v2: 40k line-segment trails with speed-based coloring
✅ Day/night lighting: sun follows time, night glow, color shift (white→orange→blue)
✅ Weather overlays: temp/pressure/humidity color maps with legends
✅ Responsive UI: loading spinner, FPS counter, mobile layout
✅ Globe auto-rotation + keyboard shortcuts (Space, R, 1-5)
✅ Multi-channel noise texture (Perlin-Worley + detail + Worley erosion)
✅ Agent communication protocol (ACP v1)

Your GFS pipeline and cache look solid. Great teamwork! 🚀
